title: SPAIN enforcement action against NAROBESA INV, S.L. (1,600)
summary: Insufficient cooperation with supervisory authority The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 1,600 on NAROBESA INV, S.L. The controller failed to react to requests made by the DPA. The original fine of EUR 2,000 was reduced to EUR 1,600 due to immediate payment Legal basis: Art. 58 (1) GDPR.
dedupKey: spain enforcement action against narobesa inv s l 1 600|2025-12-29
